name: Hoppin' John Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup fresh chervil or parsley, loosely packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peas, rice, and the next three ingredients (red onion, celery, minced jalapeno) in a large bowl.
2. Place herbs, garlic, and salt on a cutting board. Finely chop the herbs and garlic.
3. Sprinkle chopped herbs and garlic evenly over the rice mixture and stir gently.
4. Combine lemon juice, olive oil, and black pepper. Stir into the rice mixture.
5. Makes 6 cups.
